languages.original_text: "Wait, so you're here talking to your imaginary pal, and you're completely sober? I don't think I will offer you a drink after all. Who knows what you'll get up to if you have too much amasec?"

languages.text: "Погоди, то есть беседуя со своим воображаемым дружком, ты абсолютно трезв? Пожалуй, не буду предлагать тебе выпить. Кто знает, что ты учудишь, перебрав амасека".

"Wait, wait, wait, wait... So you're here talking to your imaginary pal, and you're completely sober? I don't think I will offer you a drink after all. Who knows what you'll get up to if you have too much amasec?"
languages.original_text: "Погоди, то есть беседуя со своим воображаемым дружком, ты абсолютно трезв? Пожалуй, не буду предлагать тебе выпить. Кто знает, что ты учудишь, перебрав амасека".

"Wait, so you're here talking to your imaginary pal, and you're completely sober? I don't think I will offer you a drink after all. Who knows what you'll get up to if you have too much amasec?"
"Wait, so you're here talking to your imaginary pal, and you're completely sober? I don't think I will offer you a drink after all. Who knows what you'll get up to if you have too much amasec?"

languages.text: «Espere, espere, espere, espre... ¿quiere decir que está hablando con su amigo imaginario y aún está totalmente sobrio? No creo que deba ofrecerle una bebida. ¿Qué ocurrirá si se pasa con el amasec?».
languages.original_text: "Wait, wait, wait, wait... So you're here talking to your imaginary pal, and you're completely sober? I don't think I will offer you a drink after all. Who knows what you'll get up to if you have too much amasec?"

traits.locale_text: «Espere, espere, espere, espre... ¿quiere decir que está hablando con su amigo imaginario y aún está totalmente sobrio? No creo que deba ofrecerle una bebida. ¿Qué ocurrirá si se pasa con el amasec?».

languages.text: 「待って、つまりあんたは、ここで想像上のお友達と喋ってて、しかも完全にしらふってわけ？ やっぱりあんたに酒を勧めるのはやめておくわ。アマセックを飲みすぎたら、何をしでかすか知れたもんじゃないもの」
languages.original_text: "Wait, so you're here talking to your imaginary pal, and you're completely sober? I don't think I will offer you a drink after all. Who knows what you'll get up to if you have too much amasec?"

traits.locale_text: 「待って、つまりあんたは、ここで想像上のお友達と喋ってて、しかも完全にしらふってわけ？ やっぱりあんたに酒を勧めるのはやめておくわ。アマセックを飲みすぎたら、何をしでかすか知れたもんじゃないもの」

languages.text: “等等，所以你现在处于完全清醒的状态，可还是在跟想象出来的朋友聊天？我还是别请你喝酒了，谁知道你艾玛赛克酒喝多了会干出什么事来。”
languages.original_text: "Wait, wait, wait, wait... So you're here talking to your imaginary pal, and you're completely sober? I don't think I will offer you a drink after all. Who knows what you'll get up to if you have too much amasec?"

traits.locale_text: “等等，所以你现在处于完全清醒的状态，可还是在跟想象出来的朋友聊天？我还是别请你喝酒了，谁知道你艾玛赛克酒喝多了会干出什么事来。”

languages.text: "Wartet, wartet, wartet, wartet ... "Ihr sprecht also mit Eurem imaginären Freund und seid stocknüchtern? Dann biete ich Euch wohl lieber keinen Drink an. Wer weiß, was Euch einfällt, wenn Ihr zu viel Amasec erwischt?"
languages.original_text: "Wait, wait, wait, wait... So you're here talking to your imaginary pal, and you're completely sober? I don't think I will offer you a drink after all. Who knows what you'll get up to if you have too much amasec?"

traits.locale_text: "Wartet, wartet, wartet, wartet ... "Ihr sprecht also mit Eurem imaginären Freund und seid stocknüchtern? Dann biete ich Euch wohl lieber keinen Drink an. Wer weiß, was Euch einfällt, wenn Ihr zu viel Amasec erwischt?"

languages.text: « Attendez, attendez, une petite seconde... Donc, vous parlez à votre ami imaginaire, et vous êtes complètement sobre ? Finalement, je ne vais pas vous offrir un verre. Qui sait ce qui risque de vous passer par la tête une fois que vous serez imbibé d'amasec ? »
languages.original_text: "Wait, wait, wait, wait... So you're here talking to your imaginary pal, and you're completely sober? I don't think I will offer you a drink after all. Who knows what you'll get up to if you have too much amasec?"

traits.locale_text: « Attendez, attendez, une petite seconde... Donc, vous parlez à votre ami imaginaire, et vous êtes complètement sobre ? Finalement, je ne vais pas vous offrir un verre. Qui sait ce qui risque de vous passer par la tête une fois que vous serez imbibé d'amasec ? »

languages.text: "Dur şimdi bir dakika... Sen burada hayalî arkadaşınla konuşuyorsun ve tamamen ayık mısın? Sana içki ikram edeceğimi sanmıyorum. Fazla amasek içersen neler yapacağını kim bilebilir?"
languages.original_text: "Wait, wait, wait, wait... So you're here talking to your imaginary pal, and you're completely sober? I don't think I will offer you a drink after all. Who knows what you'll get up to if you have too much amasec?"
